title: Scaled to a $5M+ Operations
summary: 0 to 200 people and a $5M+ P&L, built from the ground up - the process, stack, and ownership that scale without breaking on one person.

title: An agency, built from the ground up
summary: Came in as founding operator - name, brand, website, sales, ops, and hiring. Now a 40-person team delivering across 5 countries, all from India.

title: Internal workflow transformation
summary: A tangle of spreadsheets and hand-offs redrawn as one clear pipeline — owners, stages, and SLAs visible to everyone.

title: Social-media automation engine
summary: One content idea → captioned, scheduled, and posted across channels, with reporting that writes itself.

title: This practice - The Outlayer, built solo with AI
summary: The positioning, name, brand, copy, and site — one operator thinking it through, AI doing the build. You're looking at it.

title: Positioning & GTM sprint
summary: A muddled pitch rebuilt into one sharp position and a go-to-market the whole team can run — message, audience, and the first three moves.

title: A sanitaryware brand, built from zero
summary: A legacy sanitaryware brand with no digital presence. Built the site around what buyers actually search for - 400% user growth and 926 organic enquiries in year one, zero ad spend, now outranking Kohler and Kaff.
